layout.title: Roadmap - OpenAppCLI
layout.description: View OpenAppCLI's development roadmap, understand how we evolve from Website automation to AI Agent application interaction standard platform.

hero.title: Development Roadmap
hero.subtitle: From Concept to Reality Implementation Path
hero.description: We have defined a clear 4-phase development plan, each step moving towards Not Only Website, Not Only Data Collection goals.

phases.breakthrough: Achieve Not Only Website - Support Desktop applications

phases.phase: Phase 2: Mobile Support + MCP Mobile Integration
goals: Android basic support + MCP mobile tools
Mobile application ecosystem + MCP mobile ecosystem

phases.phase: Phase 3: Game Application Support + MCP Game Integration
goals: Unity game support + MCP Unity tools
Unreal game support + MCP Unreal tools
Universal game framework + MCP game ecosystem

phases.phase: Phase 4: AI Agent Ecosystem + Enterprise Features
phases.breakthrough: Achieve Not Only Data Collection - Two-way application control

items.description: From Web automation to full application type support
items.after: Support Desktop + Mobile + Game + Web all application types

items.description: From one-way data extraction to two-way application control
items.before: Only extract application data, cannot control application behavior
items.after: Complete application behavior control + AI Agent direct interaction
items.impact: From information tool to application interaction platform

items.description: Achieve AI Agent native integration through MCP protocol
items.before: AI Agent needs to parse text output, interaction unreliable
items.after: AI Agent directly calls MCP tools, interaction reliable
items.impact: Establish AI Agent application interaction standard

steps: OpenAppCLI 1.0: Desktop + Mobile + Game (80% application coverage)
OpenCLI: Human-computer interaction, CLI command line
OpenAppCLI 2.0: AI native interaction, MCP protocol
